author: TonyMontana
content:
**Welcome To Module 3: Setup Your Trading Station**

In this module we wil go over everything you need to know to setup your trading station. 

We will focus on making your trading station as fast as possible, this means entering, exiting or even scouting trades faster than most people.

**Workshop 3 Content:** 👇

Lesson 1 - **Different Brokers & Their Purpose**

Lesson 2 - **Setting Up Interactive Brokers**

Lesson 3 - **Setting Up Tradingview**

**Watch Module 3 Here:** 👇
https://whop.com/scarface-trades/the-accelerator-U4q53fe1xXqoEr/app/

@everyone
